# PanPanTech

> PanPanTech supplies commercial cleaning robots, autonomous floor scrubbers, multifunction cleaning robots, sweeping robots, and industrial AMR solutions for warehouses, retail, airports, hospitals, hotels, factories, and OEM / ODM distributors.

## Products
- [Commercial Cleaning Robots](https://panpantechnology.com/products/): product range overview.
- [P060 All-in-One Cleaning Robot](https://panpantechnology.com/products/p060/): compact 6-in-1 robot for indoor commercial cleaning.
- [PT90 Autonomous Floor Scrubber](https://panpantechnology.com/products/pt90/): large-area floor scrubbing robot for warehouses and public facilities.

## Buying And OEM
- [Commercial Cleaning Robot Manufacturer](https://panpantechnology.com/commercial-cleaning-robot-manufacturer/): manufacturing, QC, export, and certification information.
- [OEM / ODM Cleaning Robots](https://panpantechnology.com/oem-odm-cleaning-robots/): private-label and distributor support.
- [Request a Quote](https://panpantechnology.com/request-a-quote/): RFQ path for facility buyers and distributors.

## Facility Solutions
- [Warehouse Cleaning Robots](https://panpantechnology.com/industries/warehouse-cleaning-robots/): recommended models and ROI guidance for warehouses.
- [FAQ](https://panpantechnology.com/faqs/): shipping, certification, OEM, model selection, and support answers.
